steps.prompt: What are the best things to do in Tokyo for a family?
steps.response: Routing to Attractions: User asked for family-friendly things to do in Tokyo, so route to Attractions to gather activities and family-friendly/vegan dining options.

steps.prompt: What are the best things to do in Tokyo for a family?
steps.response: Top family-friendly picks for Tokyo—quick, fun, and easy to book.
attractions_found: Tokyo Disney Resort — World-class Disneyland & DisneySea with rides, parades and kid-friendly shows (buy tickets early because it gets very crowded).
Tokyo Tower Main Deck + 24‑hour Tokyo Subway ticket — Panoramic city views from the tower plus a convenient subway pass to zip between family sights.
Sky Hop Bus Tokyo — Hop-on hop-off sightseeing bus perfect for families to explore Shibuya, Asakusa and Odaiba at your own pace.
